name: GIGABYTE Z790 EAGLE AX ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-7600(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.2 - Realtek 5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: GIGABYTE Z790 EAGLE AX ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe
description: ATX motherboard for Intel 12th/13th gen with Z790 chipset and WiFi 6E connectivity.

specs.pcie_slots: 1x PCIe 5.0 x16, 1x PCIe 4.0 x4, 2x PCIe 3.0 x1
